data.body: We went inside, heated up dinner and we ate. His uncle came back a little over an hour later, beer in hand. I asked what was the occasion was. It was his uncle's birthday. data.body: At this point the beer was gone, so I asked them if they wanted me to go to my house and get some liquor. His uncle jumped up and said let's go. So, the three of us went to my place to get liquor, I'm a half mile down the road, it's not far.
